name: construction contractors managing 5-15 safety certifications/month tool
description: For construction contractors managing 5-15 safety certifications/month, missed renewals cause compliance penalties. We provide a tracking tool instead of manual tracking via spreadsheets or calendars.
problem_solved: Difficulty in tracking and scheduling certification renewals for safety officers.
features: simple dashboard for tracking certification status
